query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a smooth, pale mask or mannequin face angled slightly to the left, with straight light brown hair falling across the forehead and right side. Light illuminates the left cheek, nose, and lips, while the eye areas and much of the right side recede into blackness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up of a smooth, pale mask or mannequin face rendered with intentional blur and extreme underexposure, creating an unsettling, dreamlike effect. Straight light brown hair falls across the forehead and right side, partially obscuring the face, while a sickly reddish-brown color cast permeates the image. The eye sockets are crushed into black voids by shadow, and the right half of the frame is swallowed by darkness, producing an atmosphere of dread through obstructed cropping and suffocating tonal extremes.
